entry.title: Mexique : un orphelinat en difficulté suite à l’épidémie de Covid-19

link.title: Mexique : un orphelinat en difficulté suite à l’épidémie de Covid-19

entry.content:
À Ecatepec au Mexique, l’orphelinat San Martin de Porres recueille des mineurs victimes de maltraitance. Mais à cause de la pandémie, il est dans une situation critique. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: À Ecatepec au Mexique, l’orphelinat San Martin de Porres recueille des mineurs victimes de maltraitance. Mais à cause de la pandémie, il est dans une situation critique. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: S. Korea’s drive-thru virus test model proposed as global standard

link.title: S. Korea’s drive-thru virus test model proposed as global standard

entry.content:
‘K방역’ 자동차 이동형 선별진료소, 국제표준화 첫 관문통과
South Korea has won praise around the world for its innovative drive-thru model for testing people for the coronavirus.
Now the drive-thru model is being considered by the International Organization for Standardization to be made the global standard.
According to Seoul’s trade ministry, the ISO decided to take up the proposal in a vote whose results were released today.
South Korea started drive-thru testing back in February, which helped it get the local outbreak under control quickly and efficiently.
The ministry said it will take at least three years for the ISO to adopt it as the standard system globally.
entry.summary: ‘K방역’ 자동차 이동형 선별진료소, 국제표준화 첫 관문통과 South Korea has won praise around the world for its innovative drive-thru model for testing people for the coronavirus. Now the drive-thru model is being considered by the International Organization for Standardization to be made the global standard. According to Seoul’s trade ministry, the ISO decided to take up the proposal in a vote whose results were released today. South Korea started drive-thru testing back in February, which helped it get the local outbreak under control quickly and efficiently. The ministry said it will take at least three years for the ISO to adopt it as the standard system globally.

entry.title: Sushant Singh Case: केंद्र ने Supreme Court में दाखिल की अर्जी Rhea Chakraborty वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Singh Case: केंद्र ने Supreme Court में दाखिल की अर्जी Rhea Chakraborty वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
As the investigation is progressing in the actor Sushant Singh Rajput case. By the way, many revelations are happening. A petition was filed in the Supreme Court regarding this matter. Now another petition has been filed in the Supreme Court. This time the Central Government filed a petition in the Supreme Court. The central government has demanded to form a party in this case. On Friday, Bollywood actress and actor’s alleged girlfriend Riya Chakraborty reached Enforcement Directorate for questioning in Sushant Rajput case.
एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत केस में जैसे-जैसे जांच आगे बढ़ रही है. वैसे वैसे कई खुलासे होते जा रहे है. इस मामले को लेकर सुप्रीम कोर्ट में याचिका दाखिल की गई. अब एक और याचिका सुप्रीम कोर्ट में दाखिल की गई है. इस बार केंद्र सरकार ने सुप्रीम कोर्ट में याचिका दाखिल की. केंद्र सरकार ने इस केस में पक्षकार बनाने की मांग की है. शुक्रवार को सुशांत राजपूत केस में पूछताछ के लिए बॉलीवुड एक्ट्रेस और एक्टर की कथित गर्लफ्रेंड रिया चक्रवर्ती प्रवर्तन निदेशालय पहुंची.
#SushantSinghCase #SupremeCourt #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: As the investigation is progressing in the actor Sushant Singh Rajput case. By the way, many revelations are happening. A petition was filed in the Supreme Court regarding this matter. Now another petition has been filed in the Supreme Court. This time the Central Government filed a petition in the Supreme Court. The central government has demanded to form a party in this case. On Friday, Bollywood actress and actor’s alleged girlfriend Riya Chakraborty reached Enforcement Directorate for questioning in Sushant Rajput case. एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत केस में जैसे-जैसे जांच आगे बढ़ रही है. वैसे वैसे कई खुलासे होते जा रहे है. इस मामले को लेकर सुप्रीम कोर्ट में याचिका दाखिल की गई. अब एक और याचिका सुप्रीम कोर्ट में दाखिल की गई है. इस बार केंद्र सरकार ने सुप्रीम कोर्ट में याचिका दाखिल की. केंद्र सरकार ने इस केस में पक्षकार बनाने की मांग की है. शुक्रवार को सुशांत राजपूत केस में पूछताछ के लिए बॉलीवुड एक्ट्रेस और एक्टर की कथित गर्लफ्रेंड रिया चक्रवर्ती प्रवर्तन निदेशालय पहुंची. #SushantSinghCase #SupremeCourt #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Vijayawada స్వర్ణ ప్యాలెస్ కోవిడ్ ఆసుపత్రి భద్రతా ప్రమాణాలు పాటించలేదు : Fire Safety Officer

link.title: Vijayawada స్వర్ణ ప్యాలెస్ కోవిడ్ ఆసుపత్రి భద్రతా ప్రమాణాలు పాటించలేదు : Fire Safety Officer

entry.content:
Vijayawada Covid Hospital: Fire safety Officers said that Swarna Palace hotel has violated fire safety rules. "The alarm Bell didn’t ring at the time and there is delay in opening back door, he added.
#VijayawadaCovidHospital
#VijayawadaSwarnaPalaceHotel
#VijayawadaCOVIDcarecenter
#pmmodi
#apcmjagan
#exgratia
#VijayawadaCOVIDCareCentreexgratia
#SwarnaPalaceHotelMishap
#Covidpatients
#కోవిడ్ ఆసుపత్రి
#విజయవాడ స్వర్ణ ప్యాలెస్
విజయవాడ: విజయవాడలోని స్వర్ణ ప్యాలెస్ హోటల్‌ కోవిడ్ ఆసుపత్రిలో ఆదివారం తెల్లవారు జామున చోటు చేసుకున్న భారీ అగ్నిప్రమాదం ఉదంతాన్ని ప్రభుత్వం తీవ్రంగా పరిశీలిస్తోంది. ఈ ఘటనలో 11 మంది మరణించడం పట్ల ప్రభుత్వ వర్గాలు, అధికార యంత్రాంగం మొత్తం విస్తు పోతోంది.
entry.summary: Vijayawada Covid Hospital: Fire safety Officers said that Swarna Palace hotel has violated fire safety rules. "The alarm Bell didn’t ring at the time and there is delay in opening back door, he added. #VijayawadaCovidHospital #VijayawadaSwarnaPalaceHotel #VijayawadaCOVIDcarecenter #pmmodi #apcmjagan #exgratia #VijayawadaCOVIDCareCentreexgratia #SwarnaPalaceHotelMishap #Covidpatients #కోవిడ్ ఆసుపత్రి #విజయవాడ స్వర్ణ ప్యాలెస్ విజయవాడ: విజయవాడలోని స్వర్ణ ప్యాలెస్ హోటల్‌ కోవిడ్ ఆసుపత్రిలో ఆదివారం తెల్లవారు జామున చోటు చేసుకున్న భారీ అగ్నిప్రమాదం ఉదంతాన్ని ప్రభుత్వం తీవ్రంగా పరిశీలిస్తోంది. ఈ ఘటనలో 11 మంది మరణించడం పట్ల ప్రభుత్వ వర్గాలు, అధికార యంత్రాంగం మొత్తం విస్తు పోతోంది.

entry.title: Destroy All Humans! 2020 - Official Accolades Trailer (Remake)

link.title: Destroy All Humans! 2020 - Official Accolades Trailer (Remake)

entry.content:
2 weeks ago, Cryptosporidium-137 landed on planet Earth and successfully infiltrated the hearts and minds of these puny humans. Even their smartest scientists, calling themselves "gaming journalists", are impressed with the Furon invasion! Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤
With a 96% rating on Steam and a 83% positive Metacritic user-score, Destroy All Humans! has received very good ratings from the press as well as from the community. Developer Black Forest Games has done a great job of recreating the best portions of the beloved original from 2005.
Get the game here:
#DestroyAllHumans #WorldDominationTour
—
Connect with us!
▸Support us:
▸Dailymotion:
▸Facebook:
▸Twitter:
▸Twitch:
▸Web:
entry.summary: 2 weeks ago, Cryptosporidium-137 landed on planet Earth and successfully infiltrated the hearts and minds of these puny humans. Even their smartest scientists, calling themselves "gaming journalists", are impressed with the Furon invasion! Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤ With a 96% rating on Steam and a 83% positive Metacritic user-score, Destroy All Humans! has received very good ratings from the press as well as from the community. Developer Black Forest Games has done a great job of recreating the best portions of the beloved original from 2005. Get the game here: #DestroyAllHumans #WorldDominationTour — Connect with us! ▸Support us: ▸Dailymotion: ▸Facebook: ▸Twitter: ▸Twitch: ▸Web:

entry.title: HDゲームセンターCX #195 スーパーカチョーが駆け巡る「戦場の狼」Retro Game Master Game Center CX

link.title: HDゲームセンターCX #195 スーパーカチョーが駆け巡る「戦場の狼」Retro Game Master Game Center CX

entry.content:
第195回 - #195 スーパーカチョーが駆け巡る「戦場の狼」（2015年2月19日）
有野の挑戦…『戦場の狼』
たまに行くならこんな秋葉原のイベント…千代田区秋葉原・DVD-BOX11発売記念イベントの様子「秋葉原横断ウルトラQ」
ゲームセンターMSX…『ハデスの紋章』『一寸法師のどんなもんだい』
ゲーム特集（GB編）…1992年2月
Episode #195 - #195 Super Cacho Runs Through "Wolf of the Battlefield" (February 19, 2015)
Arino’s challenge… "Wolf of the Battlefield
This is the kind of event you should go to once in a while… at Akihabara, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo, the DVD-BOX11 release commemoration event.
Game Center MSX… "The Sigil of Hades" and "What kind of a guy is this?
Special feature on games (GB)… February 1992
entry.summary: 第195回 - #195 スーパーカチョーが駆け巡る「戦場の狼」（2015年2月19日） 有野の挑戦…『戦場の狼』 たまに行くならこんな秋葉原のイベント…千代田区秋葉原・DVD-BOX11発売記念イベントの様子「秋葉原横断ウルトラQ」 ゲームセンターMSX…『ハデスの紋章』『一寸法師のどんなもんだい』 ゲーム特集（GB編）…1992年2月 Episode #195 - #195 Super Cacho Runs Through "Wolf of the Battlefield" (February 19, 2015) Arino’s challenge… "Wolf of the Battlefield This is the kind of event you should go to once in a while… at Akihabara, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo, the DVD-BOX11 release commemoration event. Game Center MSX… "The Sigil of Hades" and "What kind of a guy is this? Special feature on games (GB)… February 1992

entry.title: Sushant Rajput Case: Mumbai पहुंचे पटना एसपी Vinay Tiwari को किया गया क्वारंटीन वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Rajput Case: Mumbai पहुंचे पटना एसपी Vinay Tiwari को किया गया क्वारंटीन वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Patna SP Vinay Tiwari has been quarantined, who arrived in Mumbai to investigate Sushant Singh Rajput case. Vinay Tiwari arrived in Mumbai on Sunday. Bihar DGP Gupteshwar Pandey has given information about quarantining SP Vinay Tiwari on Twitter.
एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत सुसाइड केस की जांच को लेकर मुंबई और बिहार पुलिस आमने सामने हैं. बिहार पुलिस पहले ही कह चुकी है कि मुंबई पुलिस जांच में सहयोग नहीं कर रही है. लेकिन अब ये तकरार खुलकर कर सामने आ गई है. बिहार पुलिस टीम का नेतृत्व करने मुंबई पहुंचे पटना एसपी विनय तिवारी को मुंबई में बीएमसी ने 14 दिन के लिए जबरदस्ती क्वारंटाइन कर दिया है. विनय तिवारी रविवार को मुंबई पहुंचे थे.
#SushantRajputCase #BiharPolice #MumbaiBMC
entry.summary: Patna SP Vinay Tiwari has been quarantined, who arrived in Mumbai to investigate Sushant Singh Rajput case. Vinay Tiwari arrived in Mumbai on Sunday. Bihar DGP Gupteshwar Pandey has given information about quarantining SP Vinay Tiwari on Twitter. एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत सुसाइड केस की जांच को लेकर मुंबई और बिहार पुलिस आमने सामने हैं. बिहार पुलिस पहले ही कह चुकी है कि मुंबई पुलिस जांच में सहयोग नहीं कर रही है. लेकिन अब ये तकरार खुलकर कर सामने आ गई है. बिहार पुलिस टीम का नेतृत्व करने मुंबई पहुंचे पटना एसपी विनय तिवारी को मुंबई में बीएमसी ने 14 दिन के लिए जबरदस्ती क्वारंटाइन कर दिया है. विनय तिवारी रविवार को मुंबई पहुंचे थे. #SushantRajputCase #BiharPolice #MumbaiBMC

entry.title: Coronavirus: Modi Government ने Covid-19 Financial Package की दूसरी किस्त जारी की वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus: Modi Government ने Covid-19 Financial Package की दूसरी किस्त जारी की वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Coronavirus: Modi government released second installment of Covid-19 financial package. The central government has released the second installment of Rs 890.32 crore for the 22 states and union territories of the country for the ongoing war preparations and emergency management against the corona virus.
केंद्र सरकार ने कोरोना वायरस के खिलाफ जारी जंग तैयारियों और आपात प्रबंधन के लिए देश के 22 राज्यों और केंद्र शासित प्रदेशों के लिए मोदी सरकार 890.32 करोड़ रुपये की दूसरी किस्त जारी कर दी है.
#Coronavirus #ModiGovernment #Covid19FinancialPackage
entry.summary: Coronavirus: Modi government released second installment of Covid-19 financial package. The central government has released the second installment of Rs 890.32 crore for the 22 states and union territories of the country for the ongoing war preparations and emergency management against the corona virus. केंद्र सरकार ने कोरोना वायरस के खिलाफ जारी जंग तैयारियों और आपात प्रबंधन के लिए देश के 22 राज्यों और केंद्र शासित प्रदेशों के लिए मोदी सरकार 890.32 करोड़ रुपये की दूसरी किस्त जारी कर दी है. #Coronavirus #ModiGovernment #Covid19FinancialPackage

entry.title: Paris : la liste des lieux extérieurs où le masque devient obligatoire

link.title: Paris : la liste des lieux extérieurs où le masque devient obligatoire

entry.content: Après Bruxelles et Madrid, le port du masque devient obligatoire lundi 10 août dans certains quartiers très fréquentés de Paris. Mais la stricte application de cette mesure de lutte contre le coronavirus pourrait se heurter à la vague de chaleur caniculaire en cours.
entry.summary: Après Bruxelles et Madrid, le port du masque devient obligatoire lundi 10 août dans certains quartiers très fréquentés de Paris. Mais la stricte application de cette mesure de lutte contre le coronavirus pourrait se heurter à la vague de chaleur caniculaire en cours.

entry.title: IPL 2020: Scalene Hypercharge Corona Canon to be used

link.title: IPL 2020: Scalene Hypercharge Corona Canon to be used

entry.content:
#ipl
#ipl13
#ipl2020
#iplt20
IPL 2020 : BCCI SOP insists IPL teams to install coronavirus neutralising machine called, Scalene Hypercharge Corona Canon (Shycocan).
2020 ஐபிஎல் தொடருக்கான பாதுகாப்பு விதிமுறைகளை வகுத்துள்ளது பிசிசிஐ. அதன் ஒரு பகுதியாக மூடப்பட்ட இடங்களில் காற்றில் இருக்கும் 99.9 சதவிகித கொரோனா வைரஸை அழிக்கும் நவீன மெஷினை ஐபிஎல் அணிகள் பயன்படுத்த அறிவுறுத்தப்பட்டுள்ளது
entry.summary: #ipl #ipl13 #ipl2020 #iplt20 IPL 2020 : BCCI SOP insists IPL teams to install coronavirus neutralising machine called, Scalene Hypercharge Corona Canon (Shycocan). 2020 ஐபிஎல் தொடருக்கான பாதுகாப்பு விதிமுறைகளை வகுத்துள்ளது பிசிசிஐ. அதன் ஒரு பகுதியாக மூடப்பட்ட இடங்களில் காற்றில் இருக்கும் 99.9 சதவிகித கொரோனா வைரஸை அழிக்கும் நவீன மெஷினை ஐபிஎல் அணிகள் பயன்படுத்த அறிவுறுத்தப்பட்டுள்ளது

entry.title: Kashf Episode 18 HUM TV Drama 11 August 2020

link.title: Kashf Episode 18 HUM TV Drama 11 August 2020

entry.content:
Kashf, Episode 18 - Official HD Video - 11 August 2020
The plot of drama serial ‘Kashf’ revolves around Kashf, the eldest daughter of Imtiaz, an arrogant and indolent person who dreams of becoming rich without making any efforts. Kashf, unlike her sisters and father is a realist but she is haunted by lucid visions and nightmares until she realizes that they are not just dreams but the future of people around her. Word gets out when she saves her friend from marrying a person who has sinister design, and from there the story unfolds into unpredictable turns and twists. To some she is a curse and to others a miracle!
Starring:
Hira Mani, Junaid Khan, Waseem Abbas, Munza Arif, Hajra Khan, Samina Ahmed, Saleem Mairaj, Saji Uddin, Lubna Aslam, Amir Qureshi, Abeena
Directed By: Danish Nawaz
Written By: Imran Nazeer
Produced By: MD Productions
#Kashaf #HiraMani #JunaidKhan #HUMTV #Drama #WaseemAbbas
entry.summary: Kashf, Episode 18 - Official HD Video - 11 August 2020 The plot of drama serial ‘Kashf’ revolves around Kashf, the eldest daughter of Imtiaz, an arrogant and indolent person who dreams of becoming rich without making any efforts. Kashf, unlike her sisters and father is a realist but she is haunted by lucid visions and nightmares until she realizes that they are not just dreams but the future of people around her. Word gets out when she saves her friend from marrying a person who has sinister design, and from there the story unfolds into unpredictable turns and twists. To some she is a curse and to others a miracle! Starring: Hira Mani, Junaid Khan, Waseem Abbas, Munza Arif, Hajra Khan, Samina Ahmed, Saleem Mairaj, Saji Uddin, Lubna Aslam, Amir Qureshi, Abeena Directed By: Danish Nawaz Written By: Imran Nazeer Produced By: MD Productions #Kashaf #HiraMani #JunaidKhan #HUMTV #Drama #WaseemAbbas

entry.title: Video of The Day: Marsha Aruan Bantah Pindah Agama, Anji Diperiksa Polisi

link.title: Video of The Day: Marsha Aruan Bantah Pindah Agama, Anji Diperiksa Polisi

entry.content:
Marsha Aruan bantah pindah agama setelah foto dan video pembaptisannya viral, Anji penuhi panggilan polisi terkait kasus dugaan penyebaran berita bohong ‘obat covid-19’.
Berikut ini rangkuman video artis paling hot pada Senin (10/8/2020), di antaranya: Marsha Aruan bantah pindah agama setelah foto dan video pembaptisannya viral, dan Anji penuhi panggilan polisi terkait kasus dugaan penyebaran berita bohong ‘obat covid-19’.
1. Momen Baptisnya Viral, Marsha Aruan Bantah Pindah Agama
Lewat Insta Story, Marsha Aruan membantah kabar yang beredar. Sejak lahir hingga saat ini, artis bernama lengkap Marsha Elizabeth Aruan menegaskan beragama Kristen.
Baca selengkapnya
2. Anji Diperiksa Polisi Kasus Dugaan Penyebaran Berita Bohong
Anji datang memenuhi panggilan Polda Metro Jaya terkait kasus dugaan penyebaran berita bohong alias hoaks pada Senin (10/8/2020).
Baca selengkapnya
3. Kabar Duka, Ayah Rachel Vennya Meninggal Dunia
Sambil mengunggah foto masa kecilnya dengan sang ayah, Rachel Vennya mengabarkan ayahnya telah meninggal dunia.
"See you when i see you, paps," tulis Rachel Vennya pada Minggu (9/8/2020).
Baca selengkapnya
4. Afgan Tutup Kolom Komentar Instagram usai Gosip Gay Heboh di TikTok
Afgansyah Reza menutup kolom komentar akun sosial media Instagramnya sejak 3 hari lalu, Sabtu (8/8/2020) usai heboh gosip gay-nya kembali mencuat di Twitter dan TikTok.
Baca selengkapnya
5. Dinyinyiri, Evi Masamba Bongkar Alasan Ingin Nyalon Bupati
Evi Masamba sempat dinyinyiri netizen setelah mengumumkan niatnya mencalonkan diri menjadi Bupati Luwu Utara.
Pertimbangan ibu satu anak ini mau terjun ke politik praktis sebetulnya bukan tanpa alasan. Dia menyebut kesuksesannya kini tidak lepas dari bantuan orang-orang Luwu Utara yang mendukungnya di ajang D’Academy
Baca selengkapnya
6. Pajang Foto Dinda Hauw Salat Tuai Kritikan, Rey Mbayang Jawab dengan Bijak
Pajang foto Dinda Hauw sedang salat di sepertiga malam, Rey Mbayang tuai banyak komentar, tidak sedikit yang negatif dan nyinyir.
Rey kemudian menanggapi komentar tersebut dengan mengajak para pengguna Instagram untuk tetap bersyukur.
Baca selengkapnya
entry.summary: Marsha Aruan bantah pindah agama setelah foto dan video pembaptisannya viral, Anji penuhi panggilan polisi terkait kasus dugaan penyebaran berita bohong ‘obat covid-19’. Berikut ini rangkuman video artis paling hot pada Senin (10/8/2020), di antaranya: Marsha Aruan bantah pindah agama setelah foto dan video pembaptisannya viral, dan Anji penuhi panggilan polisi terkait kasus dugaan penyebaran berita bohong ‘obat covid-19’. 1. Momen Baptisnya Viral, Marsha Aruan Bantah Pindah Agama Lewat Insta Story, Marsha Aruan membantah kabar yang beredar. Sejak lahir hingga saat ini, artis bernama lengkap Marsha Elizabeth Aruan menegaskan beragama Kristen. Baca selengkapnya 2. Anji Diperiksa Polisi Kasus Dugaan Penyebaran Berita Bohong Anji datang memenuhi panggilan Polda Metro Jaya terkait kasus dugaan penyebaran berita bohong alias hoaks pada Senin (10/8/2020). Baca selengkapnya 3. Kabar Duka, Ayah Rachel Vennya Meninggal Dunia Sambil mengunggah foto masa kecilnya dengan sang ayah, Rachel Vennya mengabarkan ayahnya telah meninggal dunia. "See you when i see you, paps," tulis Rachel Vennya pada Minggu (9/8/2020). Baca selengkapnya 4. Afgan Tutup Kolom Komentar Instagram usai Gosip Gay Heboh di TikTok Afgansyah Reza menutup kolom komentar akun sosial media Instagramnya sejak 3 hari lalu, Sabtu (8/8/2020) usai heboh gosip gay-nya kembali mencuat di Twitter dan TikTok. Baca selengkapnya 5. Dinyinyiri, Evi Masamba Bongkar Alasan Ingin Nyalon Bupati Evi Masamba sempat dinyinyiri netizen setelah mengumumkan niatnya mencalonkan diri menjadi Bupati Luwu Utara. Pertimbangan ibu satu anak ini mau terjun ke politik praktis sebetulnya bukan tanpa alasan. Dia menyebut kesuksesannya kini tidak lepas dari bantuan orang-orang Luwu Utara yang mendukungnya di ajang D’Academy Baca selengkapnya 6. Pajang Foto Dinda Hauw Salat Tuai Kritikan, Rey Mbayang Jawab dengan Bijak Pajang foto Dinda Hauw sedang salat di sepertiga malam, Rey Mbayang tuai banyak komentar, tidak sedikit yang negatif dan nyinyir. Rey kemudian menanggapi komentar tersebut dengan mengajak para pengguna Instagram untuk tetap bersyukur. Baca selengkapnya

entry.title: Unseen footage shows moment of Beirut explosion in 4K slow motion

link.title: Unseen footage shows moment of Beirut explosion in 4K slow motion

entry.content:
Never before seen footage shows the shocking moment an explosion rocked the port of Lebanon’s capital city, Beirut, on Tuesday (August 4), at approximately 6 pm local time.
The HD 4K video, recorded on an iPhone SE by Agoston Nemeth, a 42-year-old therapist from Budapest, Hungary, shows loud rumbling, as black smoke engulfs the sky, before a huge mushroom cloud and visible blast wave blows out the windows, rushing towards the camera and knocking it over.
Nemeth’s footage was captured on the terrace of his home, on the 13th floor of building next to St George Hospital, only 850 meters from the explosion.
He told Newsflare: "That evening, I heard some firework type of noise. It’s not unusual here in Lebanon, but it was so intense, so loud that I went out to the terrace. I noticed flames and in a warehouse in the port. I heard them first, like the sound of small fireworks. It was about 5.40 pm, and I went out and took some pictures from the terrace. I thought the firefighters would arrive soon, and I wanted to record them coming and put out the fire. I left my iPhone outside on the terrace, propped up on a handrail, and left it recording at around 5.50 pm.
"At 6 pm I had my therapy session with a client. Five minutes after I started the session, I heard a bigger explosion. I noticed it had escalated, so I told my client to stay there, and I checked the explosion. I was getting nervous. I went out with my camera, and I noticed it was getting bigger and bigger, some huge flames came out and suddenly there was this, ‘boom.’
"It was something I could not get away from. I experienced this white-hot glass exploding. I don’t know if I jumped or the shock waves pushed me, and I found myself on the floor. I don’t know how much time passed. I noticed shattering glass and people screaming. I looked around and saw this huge orange cloud above me.
"Then I stood up and took some pictures and video. I didn’t know if the building would collapse. Shortly after my fiancé called me, she was four or five kilometers away but also felt the blast around her."
Nemeth also told Newsflare about his now damaged apartment, that he has lived in since January 1, 2019, with his Hungarian fiancé, who works for an international organisation.
"After the blast, I saw our apartment completely demolished, completely destroyed. Clothes, books, the bed, furniture - everything mixed with glass," he said.
"Yesterday (August 6) we went back to the apartment to rescue some stuff. I saw the table on the terrace - there was one piece of glass inside the tabletop that was one centimetre deep. When my fiancee arrived she could see the metal elevator door was displaced. And I saw the walls and stairs had blood, handmarks with blood, people were all over the place injured. I could smell blood. My apartment is still in pieces now, three days on."
Nemeth continued: "Once you visit Lebanon, you fall in love with it. I cannot pinpoint one thing, its the whole thing. It’s terrible. I’m in shock, the first day I was in ‘doing’ mode. I was so active I couldn’t even sleep, maybe two hours. The next day I was very active, but I was completely numb. I had to check my whole body to see if it hurt. I started to realise how lucky I was when I saw the glass stuck in the table. And now I feel guilty. Not everybody was that lucky. I was extremely lucky to be this close but didn’t get hurt at all. I have some bruises in my shoulder but that’s all, most likely from when the blast waves pushed me to the ground."
On Friday (August 7) Lebanese Health Minister Hamad Hassan confirmed that 154 people were killed in the explosion and more than 5,000 residents were injured.
entry.summary: Never before seen footage shows the shocking moment an explosion rocked the port of Lebanon’s capital city, Beirut, on Tuesday (August 4), at approximately 6 pm local time. The HD 4K video, recorded on an iPhone SE by Agoston Nemeth, a 42-year-old therapist from Budapest, Hungary, shows loud rumbling, as black smoke engulfs the sky, before a huge mushroom cloud and visible blast wave blows out the windows, rushing towards the camera and knocking it over. Nemeth’s footage was captured on the terrace of his home, on the 13th floor of building next to St George Hospital, only 850 meters from the explosion. He told Newsflare: "That evening, I heard some firework type of noise. It’s not unusual here in Lebanon, but it was so intense, so loud that I went out to the terrace. I noticed flames and in a warehouse in the port. I heard them first, like the sound of small fireworks. It was about 5.40 pm, and I went out and took some pictures from the terrace. I thought the firefighters would arrive soon, and I wanted to record them coming and put out the fire. I left my iPhone outside on the terrace, propped up on a handrail, and left it recording at around 5.50 pm. "At 6 pm I had my therapy session with a client. Five minutes after I started the session, I heard a bigger explosion. I noticed it had escalated, so I told my client to stay there, and I checked the explosion. I was getting nervous. I went out with my camera, and I noticed it was getting bigger and bigger, some huge flames came out and suddenly there was this, ‘boom.’ "It was something I could not get away from. I experienced this white-hot glass exploding. I don’t know if I jumped or the shock waves pushed me, and I found myself on the floor. I don’t know how much time passed. I noticed shattering glass and people screaming. I looked around and saw this huge orange cloud above me. "Then I stood up and took some pictures and video. I didn’t know if the building would collapse. Shortly after my fiancé called me, she was four or five kilometers away but also felt the blast around her." Nemeth also told Newsflare about his now damaged apartment, that he has lived in since January 1, 2019, with his Hungarian fiancé, who works for an international organisation. "After the blast, I saw our apartment completely demolished, completely destroyed. Clothes, books, the bed, furniture - everything mixed with glass," he said. "Yesterday (August 6) we went back to the apartment to rescue some stuff. I saw the table on the terrace - there was one piece of glass inside the tabletop that was one centimetre deep. When my fiancee arrived she could see the metal elevator door was displaced. And I saw the walls and stairs had blood, handmarks with blood, people were all over the place injured. I could smell blood. My apartment is still in pieces now, three days on." Nemeth continued: "Once you visit Lebanon, you fall in love with it. I cannot pinpoint one thing, its the whole thing. It’s terrible. I’m in shock, the first day I was in ‘doing’ mode. I was so active I couldn’t even sleep, maybe two hours. The next day I was very active, but I was completely numb. I had to check my whole body to see if it hurt. I started to realise how lucky I was when I saw the glass stuck in the table. And now I feel guilty. Not everybody was that lucky. I was extremely lucky to be this close but didn’t get hurt at all. I have some bruises in my shoulder but that’s all, most likely from when the blast waves pushed me to the ground." On Friday (August 7) Lebanese Health Minister Hamad Hassan confirmed that 154 people were killed in the explosion and more than 5,000 residents were injured.

entry.title: Janmashtami 2020: प्रसिद्ध ISKON मंदिर में कृष्णा जन्माष्टमी की तैयारी जोरों पर वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Janmashtami 2020: प्रसिद्ध ISKON मंदिर में कृष्णा जन्माष्टमी की तैयारी जोरों पर वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
There will be no shortage this time in the grandeur of the Sri Krishna birth anniversary being held amidst the corona virus epidemic. Presently, Sri Krishna Janmashtami preparations are going on in full swing in all parts of Delhi. In this episode, preparations for Shri Krishna Janmashtami are also in full swing in the famous Iskon temple. This time due to Corona, only through the invitation letter will the entry of the selected people.
कोरोना वायरस महामारी के बीच आयोजित होने जा रहे श्रीकृष्ण जन्मोत्सव की भव्यता में इस बार भी कोई कमी नहीं रहेगी। मौजूदा समय दिल्ली के सभी हिस्सों में श्रीकृष्ण जन्माष्टमी की तैयारियां जोरों से चल रही हैं। इसी कड़ी में प्रसिद्ध इस्कोन मंदिर में भी श्री कृष्णा जन्माष्टमी के लिए तैयारियां जोरों पर है। इस बार कोरोना की वजह से केवल निमंत्रण पत्र के माध्यम से ही गिने चुने लोगों की एंट्री होगी।
#Janmashtami2020 #ISKON #KrishnaJanmashtami
entry.summary: There will be no shortage this time in the grandeur of the Sri Krishna birth anniversary being held amidst the corona virus epidemic. Presently, Sri Krishna Janmashtami preparations are going on in full swing in all parts of Delhi. In this episode, preparations for Shri Krishna Janmashtami are also in full swing in the famous Iskon temple. This time due to Corona, only through the invitation letter will the entry of the selected people. कोरोना वायरस महामारी के बीच आयोजित होने जा रहे श्रीकृष्ण जन्मोत्सव की भव्यता में इस बार भी कोई कमी नहीं रहेगी। मौजूदा समय दिल्ली के सभी हिस्सों में श्रीकृष्ण जन्माष्टमी की तैयारियां जोरों से चल रही हैं। इसी कड़ी में प्रसिद्ध इस्कोन मंदिर में भी श्री कृष्णा जन्माष्टमी के लिए तैयारियां जोरों पर है। इस बार कोरोना की वजह से केवल निमंत्रण पत्र के माध्यम से ही गिने चुने लोगों की एंट्री होगी। #Janmashtami2020 #ISKON #KrishnaJanmashtami

entry.title: Alhamdulillah, Mantan Dukun Cilik Ponari Resmi Menikahi Gadis Pujaan

link.title: Alhamdulillah, Mantan Dukun Cilik Ponari Resmi Menikahi Gadis Pujaan

entry.content:
Mantan Dukun Cilik Ponari yang sempat viral mampu menyembuhkan beberapa penyakit akhirnya resmi menkahi perempuan pujaan hatinya
Link Terkait:
Dengan latar bunga-bunga di bagian belakang, suasana pernikahan Ponari dipertegas aksen hiasan bertuliskan Ponari dan Zuhro.
Pemuda berusia 21 tahun asal Desa Balongsari Kecamatan Megaluh Jombang tersebut diketahui menikahi Zuhro, perempuan yang satu tahun lebih tua darinya.
Setelah setahun menjalani masa pacaran, keduanya sepakat untuk menggelar lamaran pada 1 Januari 2020 dan dilanjutkan menikah di awal bulan Agustus di tengah pandemi virus corona. Berita pernikahan Ponari ini pun ramai menuai beragam komentar dari warganet.
#Ponari #Menikah #DukunCilik
Video Editor: Suciati
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Mantan Dukun Cilik Ponari yang sempat viral mampu menyembuhkan beberapa penyakit akhirnya resmi menkahi perempuan pujaan hatinya Link Terkait: Dengan latar bunga-bunga di bagian belakang, suasana pernikahan Ponari dipertegas aksen hiasan bertuliskan Ponari dan Zuhro. Pemuda berusia 21 tahun asal Desa Balongsari Kecamatan Megaluh Jombang tersebut diketahui menikahi Zuhro, perempuan yang satu tahun lebih tua darinya. Setelah setahun menjalani masa pacaran, keduanya sepakat untuk menggelar lamaran pada 1 Januari 2020 dan dilanjutkan menikah di awal bulan Agustus di tengah pandemi virus corona. Berita pernikahan Ponari ini pun ramai menuai beragam komentar dari warganet. #Ponari #Menikah #DukunCilik Video Editor: Suciati ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: How to Monetize Your Podcast

link.title: How to Monetize Your Podcast

entry.content: Making money by podcasting is possible, but only if you treat your podcast the same way you would your business. Here are some common and less common ways to monetize your podcast.
entry.summary: Making money by podcasting is possible, but only if you treat your podcast the same way you would your business. Here are some common and less common ways to monetize your podcast.

entry.title: Delhi Electric Vehicle Policy: Arvind Kejriwal ने लॉन्च की Electric Vehicle Policy वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Delhi Electric Vehicle Policy: Arvind Kejriwal ने लॉन्च की Electric Vehicle Policy वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Delhi government has notified the policy made for electric vehicles on Friday. Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal gave a press release informing about the notification of electric vehicle policy, while describing the new policy as progressive, Kejriwal claimed that it will reduce pollution, increase employment and register five lakh vehicles in 5 years. CM said that with this Delhi economy is expected to get better.
दिल्ली सरकार ने शुक्रवार को इलेक्ट्रिक वाहनों के लिए बनाई गई पॉलिसी को अधिसूचित कर दिया है. मुख्यमंत्री अरविंद केजरीवाल ने प्रेसवार्ता कर इलेक्ट्रिक वाहन पॉलिसी को अधिसूचित करने की बाबत जानकारी दी, नई पॉलिसी को प्रगतिशील बताते हुए केजरीवाल ने दावा किया कि इससे प्रदूषण में कमी आएगी, रोजगार बढ़ेंगे और 5 साल में पांच लाख गाड़ियों का रजिस्ट्रेशन होगा. सीएम ने कहा कि इससे दिल्ली की इकॉनमी के और बेहतर होने की उम्मीद है.
#DelhiElectricVehiclePolicy #ArvindKejriwal #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: The Delhi government has notified the policy made for electric vehicles on Friday. Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal gave a press release informing about the notification of electric vehicle policy, while describing the new policy as progressive, Kejriwal claimed that it will reduce pollution, increase employment and register five lakh vehicles in 5 years. CM said that with this Delhi economy is expected to get better. दिल्ली सरकार ने शुक्रवार को इलेक्ट्रिक वाहनों के लिए बनाई गई पॉलिसी को अधिसूचित कर दिया है. मुख्यमंत्री अरविंद केजरीवाल ने प्रेसवार्ता कर इलेक्ट्रिक वाहन पॉलिसी को अधिसूचित करने की बाबत जानकारी दी, नई पॉलिसी को प्रगतिशील बताते हुए केजरीवाल ने दावा किया कि इससे प्रदूषण में कमी आएगी, रोजगार बढ़ेंगे और 5 साल में पांच लाख गाड़ियों का रजिस्ट्रेशन होगा. सीएम ने कहा कि इससे दिल्ली की इकॉनमी के और बेहतर होने की उम्मीद है. #DelhiElectricVehiclePolicy #ArvindKejriwal #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Big 10 conference officially postpones 2020 football season

link.title: Big 10 conference officially postpones 2020 football season

entry.content: Big Ten postpones fall sports, including football; reaction and analysis from legendary college football coach Lou Holtz. #FoxNews
entry.summary: Big Ten postpones fall sports, including football; reaction and analysis from legendary college football coach Lou Holtz. #FoxNews

entry.title: Le cerveau des chiens traite la parole de la même manière que le nôtre

link.title: Le cerveau des chiens traite la parole de la même manière que le nôtre

entry.content:
Cette nouvelle recherche montre que les chiens traitent la parole d’une façon très similaire aux humains.
Ils interprètent les mots inconnus en se basant sur l’intonation de lavoir.
Lorsque les chiens sont félicités d’une voix aiguë, ils réalisent que quelques chose de positif est exprimé.
Ils utilisent également les mêmes régions de leur cerveau pour traiter ce type de discours.
Le cerveau des chiens, à l’instar de celui des humains, traitait la parole de manière hiérarchique.
Ces travaux ont révélé que les chiens plus âgés distinguaient moins aisément les mots que les spécimens plus jeunes.
entry.summary: Cette nouvelle recherche montre que les chiens traitent la parole d’une façon très similaire aux humains. Ils interprètent les mots inconnus en se basant sur l’intonation de lavoir. Lorsque les chiens sont félicités d’une voix aiguë, ils réalisent que quelques chose de positif est exprimé. Ils utilisent également les mêmes régions de leur cerveau pour traiter ce type de discours. Le cerveau des chiens, à l’instar de celui des humains, traitait la parole de manière hiérarchique. Ces travaux ont révélé que les chiens plus âgés distinguaient moins aisément les mots que les spécimens plus jeunes.
